title: Auto Sneak-speedbridge
description: A lightweight Fabric mod that automatically holds the sneak key for you whenever you approach the edge of a block.
body:
A lightweight Fabric mod that automatically holds the sneak key for you whenever you approach the edge of a block.

Features

- Automatic sneak at block edges - checks all four corners of your hitbox every tick and forces sneak the instant any corner extends past solid ground
- Toggle on/off with J (rebindable in Options -> Controls)
- Visual feedback - "AutoSneak: Enabled" / "AutoSneak: Disabled" message in the action bar when toggling
